author: Domekologe
name: PDC_Redbot_Cogs
short: General (non-game) cogs for Red-DiscordBot by Domekologe.
description: A collection of general-purpose cogs for Red-DiscordBot, including the PDC web dashboard and its integration framework (widgets, panels, pages). Game-specific cogs live in the separate PDC_Redbot_Game_Cogs repo.
install_msg:
Thanks for adding the PDC_Redbot_Cogs repo!

Browse cogs with `[p]cog list <repo>` and install one with `[p]cog install <repo> <cog>`.
